'''jotaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulnific|vulnific]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulnific|vulnific]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jotaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotarithi|jotarithi]] || [[word:jotariji|jotariji]] || [[word:jotarishi|jotarishi]] || [[word:jotariki|jotariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotaruthuthu|jotaruthuthu]] || [[word:jotarujuju|jotarujuju]] || [[word:jotarushushu|jotarushushu]] || [[word:jotarukuku|jotarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotaruthu|jotaruthu]] || [[word:jotaruju|jotaruju]] || [[word:jotarushu|jotarushu]] || [[word:jotaruku|jotaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotarufthuf|jotarufthuf]] || [[word:jotarufjuf|jotarufjuf]] || [[word:jotarufshuf|jotarufshuf]] || [[word:jotarufkuf|jotarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotarethe|jotarethe]] || [[word:jotareje|jotareje]] || [[word:jotareshe|jotareshe]] || [[word:jotareke|jotareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotarothotho|jotarothotho]] || [[word:jotarojojo|jotarojojo]] || [[word:jotaroshosho|jotaroshosho]] || [[word:jotarokoko|jotarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotarotho|jotarotho]] || [[word:jotarojo|jotarojo]] || [[word:jotarosho|jotarosho]] || [[word:jotaroko|jotaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotarofthof|jotarofthof]] || [[word:jotarofjof|jotarofjof]] || [[word:jotarofshof|jotarofshof]] || [[word:jotarofkof|jotarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfthÃŸf|jotarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfjÃŸf|jotarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfshÃŸf|jotarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfkÃŸf|jotarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jotarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jotarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jotarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jotarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfthÃŸf|jotarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfjÃŸf|jotarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfshÃŸf|jotarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfkÃŸf|jotarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfthÃŸf|jotarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfjÃŸf|jotarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfshÃŸf|jotarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jotarÃŸfkÃŸf|jotarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jotarÃḊthÃḊ|jotarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jotarÃḊjÃḊ|jotarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jotarÃḊshÃḊ|jotarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jotarÃḊkÃḊ|jotarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jotarathatha|jotarathatha]] || [[word:jotarajaja|jotarajaja]] || [[word:jotarashasha|jotarashasha]] || [[word:jotarakaka|jotarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jotaratha|jotaratha]] || [[word:jotaraja|jotaraja]] || [[word:jotarasha|jotarasha]] || [[word:jotaraka|jotaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jotarafthaf|jotarafthaf]] || [[word:jotarafjaf|jotarafjaf]] || [[word:jotarafshaf|jotarafshaf]] || [[word:jotarafkaf|jotarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jotarasha|jotarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotarshÃḋsha|jotarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotarosha|jotarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotarmusha|jotarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotaryasha|jotaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotarnkshÃḋsha|gojotarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotarnkrosha|gojotarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotarnkmusha|gojotarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotarnkyasha|gojotarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jotatarasha|jotatarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotatarshÃḋsha|jotatarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotatarosha|jotatarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotatarmusha|jotatarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotataryasha|jotataryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotatarnkshÃḋsha|gojotatarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotatarnkrosha|gojotatarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotatarnkmusha|gojotatarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotatarnkyasha|gojotatarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jetÃḊrasha|jetÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jetÃḊrshÃḋsha|jetÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jetÃḊrosha|jetÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jetÃḊrmusha|jetÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jetÃḊryasha|jetÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojetÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gojetÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojetÃḊrnkrosha|gojetÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojetÃḊrnkmusha|gojetÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojetÃḊrnkyasha|gojetÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jotfarasha|jotfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jotfarshÃḋsha|jotfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jotfarosha|jotfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jotfarmusha|jotfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jotfaryasha|jotfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojotfarnkshÃḋsha|gojotfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojotfarnkrosha|gojotfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojotfarnkmusha|gojotfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojotfarnkyasha|gojotfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
